summary: Comprehensive testing of FletchFlow Group Management module and MEC 1 Plan Template completed. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including Groups page, group detail modal with Pulse analytics, Stop-Loss Status, SFTP Scheduler, Plan Offerings with MEC 1 badge, and New Group modal with tabs.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height calculation (-1 values)

passed_tests: ✅ Login with demo@fletchflow.com / Demo123!
✅ API: GET /api/groups returns list of groups
✅ API: GET /api/groups contains Acme Manufacturing (Tax ID: 12-3456789)
✅ API: GET /api/groups/{id} returns group with attached_plans and member_count
✅ API: Group detail includes stop-loss config ($75K specific, $500K aggregate)
✅ API: Group detail includes SFTP config (sftp.acme.com, daily, 834/835)
✅ API: GET /api/groups/{id}/pulse returns Pulse analytics with stop_loss surplus
✅ API: Pulse analytics includes surplus_bucket, utilization_pct, total_paid_ytd
✅ API: POST /api/plans/template/mec-1 creates MEC 1 plan with 22 benefits and 30 exclusions
✅ API: MEC 1 plan has $0 deductible, $0 OOP, ACA Strict preventive, 50% preauth penalty
✅ API: POST /api/groups/{id}/attach-plan attaches a plan
✅ API: PUT /api/groups/{id}/stop-loss updates stop-loss config
✅ API: PUT /api/groups/{id}/sftp updates SFTP config
✅ API: POST /api/groups creates group with all fields
✅ API: Dashboard metrics still works
✅ API: Plans list still works
✅ API: Claims list still works
✅ API: Preventive services still works
✅ UI: Groups page loads with table showing Acme Manufacturing
✅ UI: Groups page shows Total Groups (6), Total Employees (550), Plans Attached (3)
✅ UI: New Group button visible
✅ UI: Click on Acme Manufacturing opens detail modal
✅ UI: Group detail shows Pulse analytics (Members, Claims, Total Paid, PMPM)
✅ UI: Group detail shows Stop-Loss Status ($75K specific, $500K aggregate, surplus bucket)
✅ UI: Group detail shows SFTP Scheduler (sftp.acme.com, Daily, 834/835)
✅ UI: Group detail shows MEC 1 - Standard plan with MEC 1 badge
✅ UI: MEC 1 Template and Attach Plan buttons visible
✅ UI: New Group modal opens with tabs (Group Info, Stop-Loss, SFTP)
✅ UI: New Group modal has all form fields (Group Name, Tax ID, Effective Date, etc.)
✅ UI: Plan Builder shows Preventive Design dropdown (ACA Strict/Enhanced)
✅ UI: Dashboard loads correctly
✅ UI: Plans page shows MEC 1 plan
✅ UI: Preventive Services page works
✅ UI: All sidebar navigation items accessible (Dashboard, Claims, Plans, Groups, Members, Prior Auth, Preventive, Network, Code Database, Fee Schedule, Duplicates, Reports)
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts chart width/height warnings in console - consider adding explicit dimensions (LOW priority, does not affect functionality)
seed_data_creation: Test groups created during testing (TEST_MEC1_Group_*, TEST_Attach_Group_*, TEST_StopLoss_Group_*, TEST_SFTP_Group_*, TEST_Full_Group_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FletchFlow Group Management module and MEC 1 Plan Template are fully functional. Groups page shows employer groups with Tax ID, employee count, plans attached, SFTP status. Group detail modal shows Pulse analytics (members, claims, PMPM), Stop-Loss Status (specific deductible, aggregate attachment, surplus bucket, YTD utilization), SFTP Scheduler (host, schedule, file types), and Plan Offerings with MEC 1 badge. MEC 1 template creates plan with 22 benefit categories (10 covered preventive + 12 not-covered) and 30 exclusions per SOB. All existing features (Dashboard, Claims, Plans, Members, Prior Auth, Preventive, Network, Code Database, Fee Schedule, Duplicates, Reports) continue to work correctly.
